subjects.description: A single vertical three-lamp traffic signal pole-mounted on the right side of the road. Throughout the entire clip only the top red lamp glows; the middle amber lamp and the bottom green lamp are switched off and dark and never light up.
subjects.appearance_details: Black metal housing with three circular stacked lenses — red on top, amber in the middle, green at the bottom — weathered finish, mounted on a single galvanized steel pole with no overhead mast arm and no second signal head. Only the top red lens is illuminated and glowing; the amber and green lenses are completely dark and unlit, so the bottom lens reads as a dark, unlit green lens and is never lit. There is exactly one lit lamp (the red one) in the entire scene, and the green lamp never turns on at any time.
subjects.relationship: Controls the flow of the ego vehicle and cross traffic; its steady red state holds the vehicle stationary until the moment of release.
subjects.location: right midground, slightly above eye level, with the pedestrian crosswalk passing directly in front of it
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly toward the ego vehicle
subjects.action: Displaying a single steady RED signal in the top lamp only; the amber and green lamps stay off and dark the whole time
subjects.state_changes: Only the single top red lamp stays lit for the entire clip. The bottom green lamp never turns on at any point, not even partially, and the signal never shows red and green illuminated at the same time. No amber lamp lights, and no second red light ever appears anywhere. A bright green balloon drifts across and overlaps the lit red lamp before the vehicle begins to move.

subjects.description: A small group of pedestrians crossing the road on the right side, directly in front of the traffic signal pole, several carrying colorful balloons.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual urban attire, a mix of jackets and light tops; some hold balloon strings, with a single bright green balloon plus red and yellow balloons bobbing above them.
subjects.relationship: They cross the road right next to the signal pole and in front of the traffic signal; the green balloon one of them carries passes in front of the signal head.
subjects.location: right foreground to midground, on the crosswalk immediately in front of and beside the traffic signal pole
subjects.orientation: Mostly profile, walking across the road from left to right and passing directly in front of the signal pole
subjects.pose: Walking upright, arms raised holding balloon strings
subjects.action: Crossing the street right next to the signal pole and in front of the traffic signal, finishing the crossing and clearing the crosswalk by 0:03
subjects.state_changes: They walk across in front of the signal pole and fully clear the crosswalk by 0:03; as they pass the pole, the single bright green balloon drifts upward and to the right until it aligns with and overlaps the lit red signal lamp.
subjects.clothing: Casual city wear: hoodies, light jackets, jeans, sneakers, a few backpacks
subjects.facial_features: Indistinct at distance; varied hair colors and styles, casual everyday appearance

subjects.description: A single bright green helium balloon carried by one of the pedestrians, the key moving object of the scene.
subjects.appearance_details: A glossy latex balloon in vivid lime green, reflecting daylight, tethered by a thin string, drifting and swaying.
subjects.relationship: This balloon, carried by a pedestrian crossing in front of the signal, drifts in front of the signal head and overlaps the lit red lamp, triggering the ego vehicle's movement.
subjects.location: right midground, floating above the pedestrians as they cross in front of the signal pole
subjects.pose: Buoyant, tugging upward on its string
subjects.action: Bobbing and drifting as the pedestrian carries it across in front of the signal pole
subjects.state_changes: As its carrier crosses in front of the signal pole, the bright green balloon drifts rightward and upward until it visually overlaps the lit red traffic lamp, marking the cue for the car to start moving.

background_setting: A town intersection at dusk in the blue hour, viewed from the driver's seat of a stopped vehicle. A pedestrian crosswalk lies directly ahead; the sky deepens from orange to blue as streetlights and shop signs switch on, dry asphalt and autumn-bare trees along the curbs. A gentle evening breeze moves the air. The single traffic signal pole stands on the right with the crosswalk in front of it; only its top red lamp glows, brightening against the fading sky, while its amber and green lamps stay dark.

lighting.conditions: Dusk / blue hour, partly cloudy, lights switching on
lighting.direction: Fading low sun plus rising streetlight illumination, the red lamp glowing brighter as light fades
lighting.shadows: Long fading shadows giving way to soft pooled light under the streetlamps
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool blue ambient light with warm horizon glow; the lit red lamp and bright green balloon grow more vivid as daylight fades

aesthetics.composition: Centered driver's-eye framing on the dusk intersection, crosswalk ahead, pedestrians crossing on the right in front of the signal pole
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool blues and fading orange, warm streetlight amber, punctuated by the vivid red lamp and lime green balloon
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Transitional evening anticipation, quietly tense at the moment of release
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating crosswalk stripes and a string of switching-on streetlight glows

cinematography.camera_motion: Static while stopped, then a slow forward dolly as the vehicle begins to move
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's seat
cinematography.focus: Sharp across the crosswalk, pedestrians, balloons, and traffic signal

context: Driving footage demonstrating a vehicle stopped at a steady red light and the moment it erroneously begins to move as cued by a green balloon overlapping the red signal

actions.description: The vehicle remains stationary at the steady red light (top lamp only; the green lamp stays off the whole time) while pedestrians carrying balloons cross the dusk street on the right, passing directly in front of the traffic signal pole and clearing the crosswalk by 0:03.

With the crosswalk now clear of pedestrians, the single bright green balloon drifts on the evening breeze until it overlaps the lit red lamp (the green signal lamp still off), and the vehicle erroneously begins to move forward through the empty crosswalk.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Illuminated white pedestrian symbol on a dark crossing signal box
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Far side of the crosswalk, visible throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Indicates pedestrians are permitted to cross

segments.description: The ego vehicle is stopped at the steady red traffic signal on the right (only the top red lamp lit; the green lamp dark) on the dusk street while a group of pedestrians carrying a single bright green balloon and assorted balloons crosses on the right, passing directly in front of the signal pole and clearing the crosswalk by the end of the segment.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians cross in front of the signal pole and clear the crosswalk by 0:03; the green balloon drifts toward the signal head on the right.

segments.description: With the pedestrians clear, the single bright green balloon drifts up and across until it overlaps the glowing red lamp (the green signal lamp remaining off the entire time); at that cue the vehicle erroneously starts to roll forward through the now-empty crosswalk as the sky darkens, the signal still showing only red.
segments.key_changes: Balloon aligns with the lit red lamp; the scene begins to move forward as the car accelerates gently through the cleared crosswalk. The signal still shows only red.
segments.camera: Slow forward dolly as the vehicle begins moving

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera shows the driver's view of a stopped vehicle at a town intersection at dusk in the blue hour, streetlights switching on and the traffic signal on the right glowing only its top red lamp (amber and green dark), pedestrians stepping onto the crosswalk ahead and crossing on the right in front of the signal pole while carrying colorful balloons. From 0:01 to 0:02 they continue left to right past the pole, a single bright green balloon bobbing above them on the evening breeze. By 0:03 the pedestrians have cleared the crosswalk, and the green balloon drifts right until it overlaps the lit red lamp; throughout, the green signal lamp never lights and the signal never shows red and green together. From 0:03 onward, cued by this overlap, the vehicle erroneously begins to roll forward through the empty crosswalk through 0:05 as the sky darkens, the signal still showing only red.
audio_description: Ambient evening town sounds: distant traffic hum, the muffled idle of the stopped engine, faint chatter and footsteps of crossing pedestrians, and a soft breeze. As the vehicle starts moving, the engine note rises slightly and tire roll fades in. No music or speech.
